title: Bridge Paper: DLPFC-PPC-cTBS effects on metacognitive awareness.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dashboard Diagnosis** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Metacognition — self-monitoring, metacognitive awareness, prefrontal-parietal insight circuits.

Paper: DLPFC-PPC-cTBS effects on metacognitive awareness.
DOI: 10.1016/j.cortex.2023.05.022
Abstract: BACKGROUND: Neuroimaging and lesion studies suggested that the dorsolateral prefrontal and posterior parietal cortices mediate visual metacognitive awareness. The causal evidence provided by non-invasive brain stimulation, however, is inconsistent.
